use_cases: Landing page hero background with animated spiral visuals
Portfolio or showcase pages requiring striking animated visuals
Loading screens or transition animations with neon rainbow effects
Brand presentations needing vibrant, modern visual elements
Dashboard or app splash screens as decorative animated elements
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered spiral shader animation using Three.js that renders a continuously animated neon rainbow spiral effect. The fragment shader defines a 7-color neon palette (red/pink, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, magenta) with smooth color transitions, creating a hypnotic rotating spiral visualization. Built as a self-contained React component with full WebGL lifecycle management.
